title: Wawa - Westhampton, NJ - PH&C
excerpt: Key Features: 5,585 SF Food Market with Drive Thru and 6 fuel stations. Improvements to access and blacktop surfaces for neighboring business, TD Bank Pedestrian Sidewalks and Trail improvements and additions along Rancocas Rd. contentHtml:
Key Features:

  • 5,585 SF Food Market with Drive Thru and 6 fuel stations.
  • Improvements to access and blacktop surfaces for neighboring business, TD Bank
  • Pedestrian Sidewalks and Trail improvements and additions along Rancocas Rd.
  • Landscape improvements and retaining walls for neighboring business park.
  • (2) above ground storm-water infiltration basins.
  • Individual NPDES Permit
  • NJ DOT & Township access & signal improvements.

https://www.wawa.com/
